message: build: declare qa-lab aimock runtime dependency

files.patch:
@@ -995,6 +995,9 @@ importers:
 
   extensions/qa-lab:
     dependencies:
+      '@copilotkit/aimock':
+        specifier: 1.13.0
+        version: 1.13.0
       playwright-core:
         specifier: 1.59.1
         version: 1.59.1
